_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromin Deficiency Induces Endothelial Cell Proliferation and Retinal Neovascularization.

_contextSnippet: vessel-like network formation was enhanced in NF1KD ECFC when compared with shCtr ECFC, which is completely blocked by treatment of NF1KD ECFC with the PI3-K-Akt inhibitor wortmannin
details: Enhanced vessel-like network formation in NF1 knockdown ECFC compared to control, completely blocked by wortmannin treatment
